name: Impossible Lasagne Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Grease a pie plate, 10 x 1 1/2 inches.
3. Cook and stir ground beef over medium heat until brown; drain.
4. Stir in oregano, basil, tomato paste, and 1/2 cup of the mozzarella cheese.
5. Layer cottage cheese and Parmesan cheese in the pie plate.
6. Spoon the beef mixture over top.
7. Beat milk, Bisquick baking mix, eggs, salt, and pepper until smooth (15 seconds in a blender on high or 1 minute with a hand heater).
8. Pour the batter into the pie plate.
9. Bake until a knife inserted between the center and edge comes out clean, 30 to 35 minutes.
10. Sprinkle with remaining cheese.
11. Cool for 5 minutes before serving (serves 6 to 8). High Altitude (3,500 to 6,500 feet): No adjustments are necessary.
